question: Kasatkina vs. Sakkari: Match O/U 23.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Daria Kasatkina and Maria Sakkari in the Adelaide International, scheduled for January 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 24. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.

events.title: Adelaide International: Daria Kasatkina vs Maria Sakkari

This market refers on the tennis match between Daria Kasatkina and Maria Sakkari in the Adelaide International, scheduled for January 11 at 6:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Sakkari' if Maria Sakkari advances against Daria Kasatkina.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Elsa Jacquemot and Magdalena Frech in the Hobart International, scheduled for January 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 23. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.
groupItemTitle: Hobart International: Elsa Jacquemot vs Magdalena Frech Match O/U 22.5

events.title: Hobart International: Elsa Jacquemot vs Magdalena Frech
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Elsa Jacquemot and Magdalena Frech in the Hobart International, scheduled for January 11 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Jacquemot' if Elsa Jacquemot advances against Magdalena Frech.

This market will resolve to 'Frech' if Magdalena Frech advances against Elsa Jacquemot.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers on the tennis match between Andrea Vavassori and Raphael Collignon in the Adelaide International, Qualification, scheduled for January 10 at 9:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Vavassori' if Andrea Vavassori advances against Raphael Collignon.

This market will resolve to 'Collignon' if Raphael Collignon advances against Andrea Vavassori.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Caty McNally and Julia Grabher in the Hobart International, Qualification, scheduled for January 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.
groupItemTitle: Hobart International, Qualification: Caty McNally vs Julia Grabher Match O/U 21.5

events.title: Hobart International, Qualification: Caty McNally vs Julia Grabher
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Caty McNally and Julia Grabher in the Hobart International, Qualification, scheduled for January 10 at 8:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'McNally' if Caty McNally advances against Julia Grabher.

This market will resolve to 'Grabher' if Julia Grabher advances against Caty McNally.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 12, 8AM ET
description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 12, 8AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
